title: haplopappus ericoides
intro: Haplopappus ericoides, also known as the Mountain Silverbell or Rocky Mountain Silverbell, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Haplopappus ericoides include reducing inflammation, soothing sore throats, and relieving congestion. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and teas, can be made by drying and infusing the leaves and flowers, which can then be used to treat various health conditions.
